motionTokens.defaultTransition: color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease

componentNotes.buttons: Buttons are compact, graphite-forward, and neutral in expression. Primary buttons carry the darkest recurring tone.
componentNotes.cards: Cards use paper-white surfaces, subtle borders, and ambient shadows. They should never feel glossy or inflated.
componentNotes.navigation: Navigation sits inside a distinct shell. Active states invert into graphite with light text.

dos: Keep the system monochrome and paper-toned.
Use radius restraint: 18px for major shells, 14px or below for nested surfaces.
Use typography and spacing to create hierarchy before adding stronger color or decoration.
donts: Do not use pure black or pure white.
Do not reintroduce saturated brand accents.
Do not use gradients, glassmorphism, or oversized radius-heavy cards.
